strings: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest
Do you have a formal safety program?
Do you have written contracts with all subcontractors?
41 South High Street, Suite 1500, Columbus, OH, 43215
What is the most recent CSA BASIC score in Vehicle Maintenance?
Have there been any DOT violations or out-of-service orders in the past 3 years?
Are drivers in compliance with FMCSA Hours-of-Service (HOS) regulations?
Describe the primary commodities hauled by vehicle type.
Dry van: general freight, packaged goods. Flatbed: steel, lumber, machinery.
Are GPS tracking or ELD devices installed in all vehicles?
What is the most recent CSA BASIC score in Crash Indicator?
Are MVR checks performed on all drivers at least annually?
Is hired auto / non-owned auto exposure covered (employees driving personal vehicles for company business)?
Does the applicant maintain a valid DOT number and MC authority?
Are sleeper-cab tractors used for long-haul operations?
What ICC operating authority does the applicant hold (intrastate, interstate, both)?
Are any vehicles refrigerated reefer units carrying perishable freight?
Are CDL licenses verified for all drivers at time of hire?

ANY PERSON WHO KNOWINGLY AND WITH INTENT TO DEFRAUD ANY INSURANCE COMPANY OR OTHER PERSON FILES AN APPLICATION FOR INSURANCE OR STATEMENT OF CLAIM CONTAINING ANY MATERIALLY FALSE INFORMATION, OR CONCEALS FOR THE PURPOSE OF MISLEADING, INFORMATION CONCERNING ANY FACT MATERIAL THERETO, COMMITS A FRAUDULENT INSURANCE ACT, WHICH IS A CRIME AND SUBJECTS THE PERSON TO CRIMINAL AND CIVIL PENALTIES.
